events.title: VOID
events.description: VOID emerges for the first time. A new chapter from Black Room, built for those drawn to deeper atmospheres, relentless energy, and the raw intensity of hard techno. VOID is more than an event it s a space where sound, darkness, and pressure collide. For our inaugural edition, we welcome the long awaited USA debut of ARWEENN, bringing his signature driving sound to Miami for the very first time. Joining him is a carefully curated lineup of artists ready to turn the room upside down. Expect powerful rhythms, immersive visuals, and a crowd united by one purpose: losing themselves in the music. LINEUP ARWEENN (USA Debut) ADELO FRANKY DE REY HUNTER STEEL B2B ICKY Enter the unknown. Enter the pressure. Enter the VOID. GET YOUR TICKET NOW July 11th, 2026 | 10:00pm M2 [Back Room] Physical ID required | +21 No racism, sexism, homophobia, transphobia, or hate of any kind. All ticket sales are final. No refunds. Contact: info@blackroom.live or DM @blackroom.us
events.address: 1235 Washington Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, USA

events.title: RED ROOM
events.description: RED ROOM | July 24 Enter the darkness. BLACK ROOM returns to M2 Miami's Chamber Room for RED ROOM an immersive night of hypnotic techno, industrial visuals, and a strict No Phone Policy designed to keep every moment on the dancefloor. Experience a carefully curated lineup featuring: Carbon Nerve Javier Almenares The Red Noise (ARG) Marcelo Mori Expect deep, driving energy, immersive production, and an intimate atmosphere where the music comes first. Friday, July 24 Doors: 10:00 PM M2 Miami Chamber Room 1235 Washington Ave, Miami Beach, FL No Phone Policy Be present. Dance freely. Live the moment. Limited capacity. Secure your tickets before prices increase. Welcome to RED ROOM. July 24th, 2026 M2 Miami [Chamber Room] Physical ID required No racism, sexism, homophobia, transphobia, or hate of any kind. All ticket sales are final. No refunds. Contact: info@blackroom.live or DM @blackroom.us
